			<script src="https://treeboxmanila.com/wp-includes/js/wp-emoji-release.min.js?ver=6.8.5" defer=""></script><style id="embedpress-lazy-styles">
            /* Lazy loading animations */
            @keyframes ep-shimmer {
                0% { background-position: -1000px 0; }
                100% { background-position: 1000px 0; }
            }
            
            @keyframes ep-fadeIn {
                from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
                to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
            }
            
            /* Wrapper styles */
            .embedpress-lazy-wrapper {
                position: relative;
                min-height: 300px;
                margin: 20px 0;
            }
            
            /* Placeholder styles */
            .embedpress-placeholder {
                position: absolute;
                top: 0;
                left: 0;
                right: 0;
                bottom: 0;
                min-height: 400px;
                background: linear-gradient(
                    90deg,
                    #f0f0f0 0%,
                    #f8f8f8 20%,
                    #f0f0f0 40%,
                    #f0f0f0 100%
                );
                background-size: 1000px 100%;
                animation: ep-shimmer 2s infinite linear;
                border-radius: 8px;
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            }
            
            .embedpress-placeholder::before {
                content: '';
                position: absolute;
                top: 50%;
                left: 50%;
                transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
                width: 80px;
                height: 80px;
                border: 3px solid #e0e0e0;
                border-top-color: #666;
                border-radius: 50%;
                animation: ep-spin 1s linear infinite;
            }
            
            @keyframes ep-spin {
                to { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(360deg); }
            }
            
            .embedpress-placeholder-content {
                text-align: center;
                z-index: 1;
                color: #666;
                font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif;
            }
            
            .embedpress-placeholder-icon {
                font-size: 48px;
                margin-bottom: 16px;
                opacity: 0.5;
            }
            
            .embedpress-placeholder-text {
                font-size: 14px;
                margin: 8px 0 0 0;
            }
            
            /* Hide embeds until loaded */
            .embedpress-lazy-wrapper:not(.embedpress-lazy-loaded) .embedpress-wrapper,
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}:not(.${CONFIG.loadedClass}) .embedpress-embed-wrapper,
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}:not(.${CONFIG.loadedClass}) .ose-embedpress-responsive,
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}:not(.${CONFIG.loadedClass}) .embedpress-elements,
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}:not(.${CONFIG.loadedClass}) .ep-embed-content-wraper,
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}:not(.${CONFIG.loadedClass}) [data-embedpress-embed],
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}:not(.${CONFIG.loadedClass}) .wp-block-embedpress-embedpress,
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}:not(.${CONFIG.loadedClass}) figure.wp-block-embed.embedpress {
                opacity: 0;
                visibility: hidden;
                height: 0;
                overflow: hidden;
            }
            
            /* Show embeds when loaded */
            .embedpress-lazy-wrapper.embedpress-lazy-loaded .embedpress-wrapper,
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}.${CONFIG.loadedClass} .embedpress-embed-wrapper,
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}.${CONFIG.loadedClass} .ose-embedpress-responsive,
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}.${CONFIG.loadedClass} .embedpress-elements,
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}.${CONFIG.loadedClass} .ep-embed-content-wraper,
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}.${CONFIG.loadedClass} [data-embedpress-embed],
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}.${CONFIG.loadedClass} .wp-block-embedpress-embedpress,
            .${CONFIG.wrapperClass}.${CONFIG.loadedClass} figure.wp-block-embed.embedpress {
                opacity: 1;
                visibility: visible;
                height: auto;
                animation: ep-fadeIn 0.5s ease;
            }
            
            /* Hide placeholder when loaded */
            .embedpress-lazy-wrapper.embedpress-lazy-loaded .embedpress-placeholder {
                opacity: 0;
                pointer-events: none;
            }
            
            /* Responsive adjustments */
            @media (max-width: 768px) {
                .embedpress-placeholder {
                    min-height: 300px;
                }
            }
        </style></head>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
